title: Miraculous Mod
description: A WIP Mod adding content from Miraculous Ladybug & Cat Noir, in Minecraft.
body:
A WIP Mod adding content from Miraculous Ladybug & Cat Noir, in Minecraft.

## About The mod currently includes the basics of the Ladybug Miraculous - Lucky Charm, transformations, and power boosts! In future updates, I plan to add even more content, including Tikki, Miraculous Ladybug abilities, and other Miraculouses! This mod is also currently in **early development**, and so bugs will be expected! ![Miraculouusssss, Simply the besstttttt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac2a85f1f64622aa1f7343011a47e79c70064ae7.png)
## Features > By pressing 'J' or by saying in chat 'spots on' with the Ladybug Miraculous in your head slot, you can transform into Ladybug! Your chat gets masked and you get the Yo-Yo item! Shift clicking the Yo-Yo allows you to insert any item into your Yo-Yo's Probablility Storage. If the Yo-Yo is closed and you use the Yo-Yo it will allow you to turn it into a shield. > By pressing 'G' or saying in chat 'lucky charm' will spawn in a random lucky charm for you to use and try to figure out with, this can be configurable with tags with adding your own blocks to the list of summonable lucky charms!
## Plan - Survival Obtaining - Tikki - Miraculous Ladybug (maybe using ledger compatability?) - Food Related Items - More Lucky Charms - Plagg & Cat Noir
